_doc: Mode manifest for the engine test runner. Files listed here are explicitly classified outside the ordinary test mode driven by `npm test --workspace=@beerengineer/engine`. Paths are normalized relative to apps/engine/. Update this file whenever a test must move into or out of the ordinary mode; PROJ-8-PRD-1-US-1 makes this manifest the authoritative exclusion contract.

integrationOnly.reason: Spawns the full HTTP API server end-to-end; runs in `npm run test:integration` rather than the ordinary fast-feedback command.
Acceptance tests for PROJ-8-PRD-1-US-1 spawn `npm test --workspace=@beerengineer/engine` as a subprocess; classifying them out of ordinary mode prevents recursion.

sonarCoverageOnly.reason: Hits the live LLM SDK (gated on BEERENGINEER_SDK_LIVE=1); runs only when capturing Sonar coverage and is excluded from the ordinary test command.
